ab: Maqtu saak simul su’uan sui?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: Namaqtu! Piaq suu simulun sui?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: Panpungul saak madas sui. Maqtu saak simul su’uan sui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nii amin saak minadas sui.
en: B: I don't have any money either!

ab: Panpungul saak madas sui, maqtu saak simul su’uan sui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: Nii! Ni’ang asu masuqis sinimul zaku’an tu sui.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven't paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: Maqtu saak simul isuu tu hulus?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: Maqtu! Kan’anaka siza.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: Maqtu saak simul isuu tu patasan?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: Ispasimulin zaku Sani.
en: B: I lent it to Sani.

ab: Pasimuli’ang saak isuu tu suzainsia qai?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: Uu! Asa tu suqaisun kutunin.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: Qudananin, nii saak minadas talulung. Pasimuling saak talulung qai?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It's raining, I don't have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: Muhaz inaak tas’a talulung. Muskun ata talulungan.
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let's stick together!

ab: Sinimul zaku tangusang tu patasan, suqaisun zaku su’uan.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: Ma’aq isuu asa’un saduu patasan, tupa’i saak.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: Laku’aq saak masuqis sui pisuu?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: Nitu maku’aq, tudiip i haiza’in isuu sui.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It's okay, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: Laku’aq asu masuqis sinimul su’u tu sui?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: Suqaisun zaku kutunin.
en: A: I'll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: Laku’aq asu masuqis sinimul su’u tu patasan?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: Tupa i suqaisunin zaku su’uan takna?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn't I return it to you yesterday?

ab: Isia Lian sinpasumul su’u tu ispapatasun?
en: A: Did Lian lend you this pen?

ab: Uu! Sinimul zaku haip.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: Sinimul su’u ka ispapatasun Masau?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Masau?

ab: Nii! Sinbaliv inaak tu tina.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: Uka’in qasila. Simula haan Mua qasila.
en: A: We are out of salt, let's go borrow some from Mua.

ab: Uu! Zaku simul.
en: B: Okay, I'll borrow it.

ab: Tupa’i Savung tu suqaisi inaak tu sui.
en: B: Go tell Savung to give me my money back.

ab: Piaq isiata sinimul sui?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
